title: SangriaCraftSMP
description: The SangriaCraft SMP Mod Pack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience while still maintaining the integrity of the server and fairness for all players. The mod pack has been preapproved for use on SangriaCraft SMP
body:
The SangriaCraft SMP Mod Pack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience while still maintaining the integrity of the server and fairness for all players. The mod pack has been carefully selected and preapproved for use on SangriaCraft, so you can be confident that it won't cause any issues.

From inventory management to aesthetic enhancements, the SangriaCraft Mod Pack has everything you need to improve your gameplay experience. For any mod not in this pack that you would like to use, please contact a Mod or Admin to make sure it is allowed on the server.
